title: nepeta × campylantha
intro: Nepeta × campylantha, also known as campanellata catmint, is a hybrid perennial plant in the family Lamiaceae, derived from the cross between Nepeta faassenii and Nepeta govaniana. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Nepeta × campylantha include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce anxiety and stress, and exhibit antimicrobial effects. Nepeta × campylantha can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
